modules.sql: SELECT cp.customer_id, COALESCE(c.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(c.last_name, '') AS last_name, MIN(cp.ifw_effective_date) AS ifw_effective_date FROM customer_preferences cp INNER JOIN customers c ON c.id = cp.customer_id AND c.ifw_effective_date = cp.ifw_effective_date WHERE strftime('%w', cp.ifw_effective_date) != '0' GROUP BY cp.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 AND COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN cp.opted_in = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ORDER BY cp.customer_id
